revision.comment: use [[Module:Template wrapper]] so that we don't have to maintain the intermediate list of parameters used by the various sub-templates;

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you --> </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_Style_documentation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_Style_documentation for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Citation Style documentation/{{{1|}}}|_include-positional=yes}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please add documentation and categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, thank you --> </noinclude>
